query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "ui-mopd: multi-platform on-policy distillation for continual gui agent" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (d) as a foundational methodology reference for the "continual learning" component of the user's question, and criterion (a) by addressing the core mechanism of "on-policy distillation" (via interference reduction in continual learning) which is central to the user's proposed "UI-MOPD" framework. Although it does not specifically mention GUI agents or linguistics, it provides the canonical theoretical basis for the continual learning aspect of the user's research.
